Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Billy\\source\\repos\\BasketballSim" && python3 -c "
import json
with open\('BasketballSim.Calibration/season_results.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)

la = d['league_averages']
print\('=== LEAGUE AVERAGES ==='\)
print\(f'PPG: {la[\\"ppg\\"]} \(NBA target: 114.7\)'\)
print\(f'FGM/FGA: {la[\\"fgm\\"]}/{la[\\"fga\\"]} FG%: {la[\\"fg_pct\\"]:.3f} \(target: 42.9/90.2, 47.6%\)'\)
print\(f'3PM/3PA: {la[\\"tpm\\"]}/{la[\\"tpa\\"]} 3P%: {la[\\"tp_pct\\"]:.3f} \(target: 12.6/35.1, 35.9%\)'\)
print\(f'FTM/FTA: {la[\\"ftm\\"]}/{la[\\"fta\\"]} FT%: {la[\\"ft_pct\\"]:.3f} \(target: 16.5/21.4, 77.1%\)'\)
print\(f'REB: {la[\\"reb\\"]} \(OREB:{la[\\"oreb\\"]} DREB:{la[\\"dreb\\"]}\) target: 43.2 \(10.2/33.0\)'\)
print\(f'AST: {la[\\"ast\\"]} \(target: 26.0\)'\)
print\(f'STL: {la[\\"stl\\"]} \(target: 7.8\)'\)
print\(f'BLK: {la[\\"blk\\"]} \(target: 4.8\)'\)
print\(f'TOV: {la[\\"tov\\"]} \(target: 13.7\)'\)

leaders = d['league_leaders']
print\(\)
print\('=== TOP 20 SCORERS ==='\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['pts'], reverse=True\)[:20]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"team\\"]} {p[\\"pos\\"]} {p[\\"pts\\"]:5.1f} pts  {p[\\"fg_pct\\"]:.3f}fg  {p[\\"tp_pct\\"] or 0:.3f}3p  {p[\\"min\\"]:.1f}min'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== TOP 15 REBOUNDERS ==='\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['reb'], reverse=True\)[:15]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"team\\"]} {p[\\"pos\\"]} {p[\\"reb\\"]:5.1f} reb  {p[\\"orb\\"]:.1f}orb  {p[\\"drb\\"]:.1f}drb'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== TOP 15 ASSISTERS ==='\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['ast'], reverse=True\)[:15]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"team\\"]} {p[\\"pos\\"]} {p[\\"ast\\"]:5.1f} ast  {p[\\"pts\\"]:.1f}pts'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== PTS DISTRIBUTION \(all players with >15min\) ==='\)
active = [p for p in leaders if p['min'] >= 15]
pts_sorted = sorted\(active, key=lambda x: x['pts'], reverse=True\)
buckets = {'30+':0,'25-30':0,'20-25':0,'15-20':0,'10-15':0,'5-10':0,'<5':0}
for p in active:
    pts = p['pts']
    if pts >= 30: buckets['30+'] += 1
    elif pts >= 25: buckets['25-30'] += 1
    elif pts >= 20: buckets['20-25'] += 1
    elif pts >= 15: buckets['15-20'] += 1
    elif pts >= 10: buckets['10-15'] += 1
    elif pts >= 5: buckets['5-10'] += 1
    else: buckets['<5'] += 1
for k,v in buckets.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== FG% DISTRIBUTION \(>4 fga/g\) ==='\)
shooters = [p for p in leaders if p['fga'] >= 4]
fg_pcts = [p['fg_pct'] for p in shooters]
print\(f'  Avg: {sum\(fg_pcts\)/len\(fg_pcts\):.3f}  Min: {min\(fg_pcts\):.3f}  Max: {max\(fg_pcts\):.3f}'\)
print\(f'  >55%: {sum\(1 for x in fg_pcts if x>=0.55\)}  50-55%: {sum\(1 for x in fg_pcts if 0.50<=x<0.55\)}  45-50%: {sum\(1 for x in fg_pcts if 0.45<=x<0.50\)}  <45%: {sum\(1 for x in fg_pcts if x<0.45\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 3P% DISTRIBUTION \(>2 3pa/g\) ==='\)
three_shooters = [p for p in leaders if p.get\('tp_pct'\) and p['tpa'] >= 2]
tp_pcts = [p['tp_pct'] for p in three_shooters]
print\(f'  Avg: {sum\(tp_pcts\)/len\(tp_pcts\):.3f}  Min: {min\(tp_pcts\):.3f}  Max: {max\(tp_pcts\):.3f}'\)
print\(f'  >42%: {sum\(1 for x in tp_pcts if x>=0.42\)}  37-42%: {sum\(1 for x in tp_pcts if 0.37<=x<0.42\)}  32-37%: {sum\(1 for x in tp_pcts if 0.32<=x<0.37\)}  <32%: {sum\(1 for x in tp_pcts if x<0.32\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== MIN DISTRIBUTION \(starters vs bench\) ==='\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['min'], reverse=True\)[:10]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"min\\"]:.1f} min  {p[\\"pts\\"]:.1f}pts'\)
print\(\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['min']\)[:5]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"min\\"]:.1f} min  {p[\\"pts\\"]:.1f}pts'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== BENCH PLAYERS \(0 min\) ==='\)
zero = [p for p in leaders if p['min'] == 0]
print\(f'  {len\(zero\)} players with 0 minutes'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Billy\\source\\repos\\BasketballSim" && python3 -c "
import json
with open\('BasketballSim.Calibration/season_results.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)

la = d['league_averages']
print\('=== LEAGUE AVERAGES \(sim vs NBA target\) ==='\)
stats = [
    \('PPG',    la['ppg'],    114.7\),
    \('FGM',    la['fgm'],    42.9\),
    \('FGA',    la['fga'],    90.2\),
    \('FG%',    la['fg_pct'], 0.476\),
    \('3PM',    la['tpm'],    12.6\),
    \('3PA',    la['tpa'],    35.1\),
    \('3P%',    la['tp_pct'], 0.359\),
    \('FTM',    la['ftm'],    16.5\),
    \('FTA',    la['fta'],    21.4\),
    \('FT%',    la['ft_pct'], 0.771\),
    \('OREB',   la['oreb'],   10.2\),
    \('DREB',   la['dreb'],   33.0\),
    \('AST',    la['ast'],    26.0\),
    \('STL',    la['stl'],    7.8\),
    \('BLK',    la['blk'],    4.8\),
    \('TOV',    la['tov'],    13.7\),
]
for name, sim, tgt in stats:
    diff = sim - tgt
    flag = '  OK' if abs\(diff/tgt\) < 0.05 else \(' HIGH' if diff > 0 else '  LOW'\)
    print\(f'  {name:5s}: sim={sim:6.2f}  target={tgt:6.2f}  diff={diff:+.2f} {flag}'\)

leaders = d['league_leaders']
active = [p for p in leaders if p['min'] >= 15]

print\(\)
print\('=== TOP 20 SCORERS ==='\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['pts'], reverse=True\)[:20]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"team\\"]:3s} {p[\\"pos\\"]:2s}  {p[\\"pts\\"]:5.1f}pts  {p[\\"fg_pct\\"]:.3f}fg  {p.get\(\\"tp_pct\\"\) or 0:.3f}3p  {p[\\"min\\"]:.1f}min  {p[\\"ast\\"]:.1f}ast'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== TOP 15 ASSISTERS ==='\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['ast'], reverse=True\)[:15]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"team\\"]:3s} {p[\\"pos\\"]:2s}  {p[\\"ast\\"]:5.1f}ast  {p[\\"pts\\"]:.1f}pts  pass={p[\\"pos\\"]}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== TOP 15 REBOUNDERS ==='\)
for p in sorted\(leaders, key=lambda x: x['reb'], reverse=True\)[:15]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"team\\"]:3s} {p[\\"pos\\"]:2s}  {p[\\"reb\\"]:5.1f}reb \({p[\\"orb\\"]:.1f}o/{p[\\"drb\\"]:.1f}d\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== PTS DISTRIBUTION \(>15min\) ==='\)
pts_sorted = sorted\(active, key=lambda x: x['pts'], reverse=True\)
b = {'30+':0,'25-30':0,'20-25':0,'15-20':0,'10-15':0,'5-10':0,'<5':0}
for p in active:
    pts = p['pts']
    if pts>=30: b['30+']+=1
    elif pts>=25: b['25-30']+=1
    elif pts>=20: b['20-25']+=1
    elif pts>=15: b['15-20']+=1
    elif pts>=10: b['10-15']+=1
    elif pts>=5: b['5-10']+=1
    else: b['<5']+=1
for k,v in b.items\(\): print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== FG% DISTRIBUTION \(>4 fga/g\) ==='\)
shooters = [p for p in leaders if p['fga'] >= 4]
fg = [p['fg_pct'] for p in shooters]
print\(f'  Avg:{sum\(fg\)/len\(fg\):.3f}  >55%:{sum\(1 for x in fg if x>=0.55\)}  50-55%:{sum\(1 for x in fg if 0.50<=x<0.55\)}  45-50%:{sum\(1 for x in fg if 0.45<=x<0.50\)}  40-45%:{sum\(1 for x in fg if 0.40<=x<0.45\)}  <40%:{sum\(1 for x in fg if x<0.40\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 3P% DISTRIBUTION \(>2 3pa/g\) ==='\)
t3 = [p for p in leaders if p.get\('tp_pct'\) and p['tpa']>=2]
tp = [p['tp_pct'] for p in t3]
if tp: print\(f'  Avg:{sum\(tp\)/len\(tp\):.3f}  >40%:{sum\(1 for x in tp if x>=0.40\)}  36-40%:{sum\(1 for x in tp if 0.36<=x<0.40\)}  32-36%:{sum\(1 for x in tp if 0.32<=x<0.36\)}  <32%:{sum\(1 for x in tp if x<0.32\)}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== STL/BLK leaders ==='\)
print\('Top steals:'\)
for p in sorted\(active, key=lambda x: x['stl'], reverse=True\)[:8]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"stl\\"]:.2f}'\)
print\('Top blocks:'\)
for p in sorted\(active, key=lambda x: x['blk'], reverse=True\)[:8]:
    print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]:25s} {p[\\"blk\\"]:.2f}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== WIN DISTRIBUTION ==='\)
teams = sorted\(d['teams'], key=lambda x: x['record']['wins'], reverse=True\)
wins = [t['record']['wins'] for t in teams]
print\(f'  Best: {wins[0]}  Worst: {wins[-1]}  Avg: {sum\(wins\)/len\(wins\):.1f}'\)
print\(f'  60+W: {sum\(1 for w in wins if w>=60\)}  50-59: {sum\(1 for w in wins if 50<=w<60\)}  40-49: {sum\(1 for w in wins if 40<=w<50\)}  <40: {sum\(1 for w in wins if w<40\)}'\)
for t in teams[:5]: print\(f'  {t[\\"abbr\\"]:5s} {t[\\"record\\"][\\"wins\\"]}-{t[\\"record\\"][\\"losses\\"]}  {t[\\"per_game\\"][\\"ppg\\"]}ppg'\)
print\('  ...'\)
for t in teams[-3:]: print\(f'  {t[\\"abbr\\"]:5s} {t[\\"record\\"][\\"wins\\"]}-{t[\\"record\\"][\\"losses\\"]}  {t[\\"per_game\\"][\\"ppg\\"]}ppg'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Billy\\source\\repos\\BasketballSim" && python -c "
import json
with open\('BasketballSim.Calibration/season_results.json'\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)

la = d['league_averages']
print\('=== LEAGUE AVERAGES vs NBA 2023-24 TARGETS ==='\)
print\(f'PPG:   {la[\\"ppg\\"]:.1f}   target ~114'\)
print\(f'FGM:   {la[\\"fgm\\"]:.1f}   target 42.9'\)
print\(f'FGA:   {la[\\"fga\\"]:.1f}   target 88.1'\)
print\(f'FG%:   {la[\\"fg_pct\\"]*100:.1f}%  target 48.7%'\)
print\(f'3PM:   {la[\\"tpm\\"]:.1f}   target 13.1'\)
print\(f'3PA:   {la[\\"tpa\\"]:.1f}   target 34.9'\)
print\(f'3P%:   {la[\\"tp_pct\\"]*100:.1f}%  target 37.5%'\)
print\(f'FTM:   {la[\\"ftm\\"]:.1f}   target 19.0'\)
print\(f'FTA:   {la[\\"fta\\"]:.1f}   target 24.4'\)
print\(f'FT%:   {la[\\"ft_pct\\"]*100:.1f}%  target 77.9%'\)
print\(f'OREB:  {la[\\"oreb\\"]:.1f}   target 9.5'\)
print\(f'DREB:  {la[\\"dreb\\"]:.1f}   target 32.3'\)
print\(f'REB:   {la[\\"reb\\"]:.1f}   target 41.8'\)
print\(f'AST:   {la[\\"ast\\"]:.1f}   target 27.0'\)
print\(f'STL:   {la[\\"stl\\"]:.1f}   target 7.4'\)
print\(f'BLK:   {la[\\"blk\\"]:.1f}   target 4.9'\)
print\(f'TOV:   {la[\\"tov\\"]:.1f}   target 13.9'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== TEAM SPREAD ==='\)
for key in ['fg_pct','blk','oreb','dreb','tov','stl']:
    vals = [t[key] for t in d['teams']]
    print\(f'{key:8}: min={min\(vals\):.2f}  max={max\(vals\):.2f}  spread={max\(vals\)-min\(vals\):.2f}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== LEAGUE LEADERS ==='\)
ll = d['league_leaders']
for cat, players in ll.items\(\):
    top = players[:3]
    print\(f'{cat}: ' + ', '.join\(f\\"{p['name']} {p['value']:.1f}\\" for p in top\)\)
" 2>&1)
